title: GrapeCraft
description: A simple mod that adds grapes to the game.
body:
# Grape Craft

## A simple mod that adds grapes to the game.
### 1. Planting grapes
To plant grapes, first build a planting frame:

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/708/606/310/172/2023-08-08_17.png "")

Then you need to right-click at the root of the planting frame to place grape seeds:

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/708/609/310/172/2023-08-08_18.png "")

Finally, wait for the grapes to grow:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NCdolSJv/images/250f03d5805c6f36bac74fb4e5f37cddc8bd6a1a.png "")

### 2. Mod Items
Planting Rack: Used to build planting frame.

Grape Seeds: Used for planting grapes.

Grape: Can be eaten, each restoring 1 point of saturation
